app.title: AIReady - AI Tool Setup Helper
app.subtitle: Install and configure AI tools quickly and easily
lang.select.title: Select Language
tool.select.title: Select a Tool to Install
tool.claude_code.name: Claude Code
tool.claude_code.note: Requires Anthropic account or API key
tool.openclaw.name: OpenClaw
tool.openclaw.desc: Open-source AI gateway supporting multiple providers
tool.openclaw.note: Supports OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, and more
progress.title: Installation Progress
error.network: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.permission: Permission denied. Administrator privileges may be required.
error.disk_full: Not enough disk space. Please free up space and try again.
error.path_not_updated: PATH was not updated. Please restart your terminal or add the PATH manually.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please check your key and try again.
error.verification_failed: Verification failed. Please re-run the installer or check the logs.
provider.select.title: Select AI Provider
provider.local_no_key: Runs locally, no API key required
apikey.title: Enter Your API Key
apikey.prompt: Paste your API key below to continue
auth.title: Authenticate with Claude Code
auth.step1: Open the URL in your browser
auth.step2: Log in with your Anthropic account
auth.step3: Copy the authorization code and paste it here
auth.subscription_warning: A Claude Pro subscription or API key is required to use Claude Code.
complete.title: Setup Complete
complete.success: {tool} has been successfully installed and configured.
complete.command_hint: You can now use the following command:
complete.new_terminal_notice: Open a new terminal window for PATH changes to take effect.
elevation.reason.install_package: Administrator privileges are required to install packages.
elevation.denied: Setup cannot continue without administrator privileges.
